error_signature: is not null condition in multi-split doesn't work
title: Multi-option split condition fails for 'is not null'
symptom: The multi-option split workflow step does not correctly evaluate conditions using 'is not null', defaulting to the last option instead.
applies_when: Conditions involve checking for null values
not_this_if: Conditions are correctly structured or only use 'is null'
root_cause: The multi-option split step may have a bug or limitation that prevents it from correctly evaluating 'is not null' conditions, leading to unexpected behavior where the last option is always selected.
fix_steps: Change the condition from 'is not null' to 'is null' for the desired branch
Ensure the other branch handles the 'not null' case implicitly
Test the workflow to confirm correct behavior
agent_instruction: Modify the multi-option split conditions to only use 'is null' for accurate results.
